headlines.title: Trump says agreement on Iran war ‘largely negotiated’
headlines.description: Officials from the U.S. and Iran appear to be nearing a deal to end the ongoing Middle-East conflict, according to public statements from President Donald Trump Saturday. “An Agreement has been largely negotiated, subject to finalization between the United States of America, the Islamic Republic of Iran, and the various other Countries, as listed,” Trump wrote in a Truth Social post Saturday afternoon. NBC News' Raf Sanchez reports.

headlines.title: Secret Service Takes Down Gunman Near White House
headlines.description: The Secret Service shot and killed an armed suspect who opened fire at a security checkpoint outside the White House. The 21-year-old suspect was known to police and Secret Service with a history of mental health concerns, according to multiple senior law enforcement officials. A second person, who authorities believe to be a bystander, was injured in the shooting and that person’s condition is unclear. NBC’s Julie Tsirkin reports for Sunday TODAY.

headlines.title: State of emergency declared over southern California chemical incident
headlines.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom (D-CA) declared a state of emergency in California on Saturday as thousands of people were forced to evacuate their homes over a toxic chemical tank that, authorities say, will either leak or explode. NBC News' Steve Patterson is on the ground just outside the evacuation zone.

headlines.title: Massie says he’ll ‘stay engaged’ after primary loss, won’t rule out 2028 run
headlines.description: Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) tells Meet the Press he “won't rule anything out” as he’s asked about his political future after losing his primary to a Trump-backed challenger.

headlines.title: DR Congo’s neighbors impose Covid-style measures in push to limit Ebola’s spread
headlines.description: Regional concern over the Ebola outbreak intensified Saturday as Uganda confirmed three new cases, while neighboring countries stepped up monitoring measures amid fears of cross-border spread.

headlines.title: ‘Virgin River’ actor Stewart McLean found dead as homicide investigation is launched
headlines.description: The body of “Virgin River” actor Stewart McLean was found days after he was reported missing in the Canadian province of British Columbia, according to officials.

headlines.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: 5 Chicago police officers struck by a car while dispersing a crowd
headlines.description: Five Chicago police officers were hit by a car early Sunday morning while on duty on the city’s west side, the department said.

headlines.title: Rep. Thomas Massie warns GOP will be ‘very vulnerable’ in the midterms
headlines.description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., warned in a Sunday interview on “Meet the Press” that the Republican Party will be “very vulnerable” during the midterm elections

headlines.title: DR Congo’s neighbors impose Covid-style measures in push to limit Ebola’s spread
headlines.description: Regional concern over the Ebola outbreak intensified Saturday as Uganda confirmed three new cases, while neighboring countries stepped up monitoring measures amid fears of cross-border spread.

headlines.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI
